name: hockey-smash
description: A beginner-friendly side-scrolling browser game set in Soldotna, Alaska.

scripts.verify: npm run verify:syntax && npm run verify:hockey
scripts.verify:syntax: sh -c 'set -e; for f in js/games/*.js; do node --check "$f"; done; if [ -d scripts ]; then for f in scripts/*.js; do [ -e "$f" ] && node --check "$f"; done; fi'
